title: Springnions
description: Need some more variety in your veggies? This mod has what you're looking for and some machinery too!
body:
CurseForge

Planet Minecraft

Minecraft Forums [OUTDATED]

Springnions is a food mod based solely around the addition of onions and soybeans into the game.

 

 

You can store these new onions in onion crates which can be stored inside onion shelves.

 

The new soybeans can be either crafted into soymilk, a new fluid that erases all potion effects when you swim in it, or pressed into tofu using the new tofu press!

 
The new machines have recipes similar to pistons but instead using new items added in with the mod.

 

NEW in version 2.0.0! The Cultivator, a fully fledged auto harvesting device that consumes 256 FE/harvest by default but is configurable in the config files.

 

Here is a sped up gif of the cultivator functioning, it has an internal energy storage that can be modified through the config files and an internal generator because of the generator used to craft it.

 

the sound I use for the tofu presses is: "Printing Press Mechanics" (freesound.org/s/174822/) by exuberate is licensed under CC BY 3.0 (creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/legalcode)
